case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. DAVID MANGAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANGAN, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1190 HOWARD STREET #323, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
